caption:
Marigold lazim digunakan untuk keperluan sesaji umat Hindu, tidak heran jika perkebunan Marigold terbesar di dunia ada di India, sedangkan di Indonesia terletak di Bali. Di Bali sendiri, bunga ini dikenal dengan nama ‘Gumitir’. Setelah bibit tumbuh, masuk ke tahap perawatan bunga. Pada fase vegetatif, pemupukan dilakukan hingga 7 sampai 10 hari sekali. Penyiraman bunga Marigold dilakukan secara berkala tergantung pada musim dan kebutuhan tanaman. Umumnya, hama yang menyerang bunga dan daun Marigold adalah tungau dan ulat, yang diberantas menggunakan insektisida.

____

Marigold commonly used as a part of the offering for God and Goddess in Hindu, no wonder that the biggest Marigold plantation in the world is located in India, and the biggest one in Indonesia is in Bali. Balinese people call this flower ‘Gumitir’. After sprouting, we continue to the care and treatment of the flower. On vegetative phase, fertilize the soil once every 7 to 10 days. Water the flower accordingly depends on the season and needs of the plant. Common pests that attack leaf and flower of Marigold are mites and caterpillars, that can be dislodged and controlled using insecticide.

#rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriindonesia #marigold #indonesia #plant

caption:
Apa saja aktivitas yang bisa dilakukan di Rumah Atsiri Indonesia? Pertanyaan ini masih sering diajukan oleh calon pengunjung yang tertarik untuk datang. Jawabannya? Ada banyak sekali! Kesemuanya akan memanjakan semua panca indera dan menawarkan pengalaman sensori yang tak terlupakan.

Hal pertama yang bisa kamu lakukan saat berkunjung adalah mengikuti tur taman yang akan ditemani oleh edukator kami. Pengunjung dapat melihat berbagai tanaman penghasil minyak atsiri, meraba, mencium, hingga mencicipi langsung beberapa tanaman dengan arahan dari edukator kami.

Intip keseruan tamu kami hari Selasa, 23 Juli lalu di Aromatic Garden dan Greenhouse Taman Atsiri. @tasyafarasya, @ayladimitri, @alodita, dan @atiit, serta @nikeprima dan @mamiraz dari @livinglovingnet berkunjung selama kurang lebih 4 jam dalam rangka #herbanaexperience yang diadakan oleh @herbana.id, dan berkesempatan untuk #ExperienceTheEssence di Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.

_____

What are the to-do activities in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia? This has become our most frequently-asked-question from so many of you. The answer is? A lot! The activities will nurture your five senses and offer you a remarkable sensory experience.

It is best to start your journey by joining the aromatic garden tour, guided by our educator. Visitors can see various types of plants that produce essential oils. You can also touch them, smell them, or even taste them directly with guidance.

See what went on last Tuesday, July 23 at the Aromatic Garden and Greenhouse when our guests,  @tasyafarasya, @ayladimitri, @alodita, and @atiit, with @nikeprima and @mamiraz from @livinglovingnet joined the #herbanaexperience by @herbana.id and visited the complex for approximately 4 hours to #ExperienceTheEssence in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.

caption:
What is your favorite aroma? Do you know that the tendency to like a particular aroma is related to the effect that aroma presents to us, psychologically? 
Aroma actually stimulates brain nerves to send certain messages to all the cells in the human body. There are aromas that give rise to a feeling of freshness, help you sleep well, and return your vigor. This explains why our fondness for a particular aroma tends to be very personal.

In Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, one of your aroma-adventure can be experienced through blending aromatic oil. We are free to do the oil-blending process ourselves, based on the aroma that we like, so the blend produces an aromatic oil that is beneficial for our body and has a certain psychological impact.

#infoatsiri: The practice of blending your own aromatic oil can be experienced at Rumah Atsiri Shop anytime during their operational hours, without reservation.
#rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriindonesia

caption:
Do you know that you don't have to pay for an entrance fee to visit Rumah Atsiri Indonesia (RAI)? You only need to get an IDR 50K voucher that contains a balance of the same value. 
You can use this voucher to participate in various activities related to essential oils--from joining workshops or oil-blending class, souvenir-shopping at our essential oil shop, or dining in our restaurant, tasting dishes with essential oil plants ingredients. If you spend more than your voucher's balance (more than IDR50K), you can just simply pay for the excess.

For more information, don't hesitate to ask our Atsiri friends at the entrance. Enjoy your aromatic adventure in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.
.

caption:
For urbanites, space for planting was becoming more sparse due to the increasing amount of space dedicated to housing. In Japan, the problem is solved by creating an alternative planting medium where plants can be placed in a room without the need for land or large space. It's called kokedama. Kokedama branches from an earlier Japanese art of planting that were more familiar: bonsai.

In Japanese, 'Koke' means moss, and 'Dama' means ball. This name corresponds to the material used for Kokedama's planting medium and the shape of the Kokedama itself. The soil is formed into a round ball-like shape and then coated with moss. Apart from its decorative purposes, kokedama made of essential oil plants can also function as an air freshener.

caption:
Building A or the Citronella Building of Rumah Atsiri Indonesia was once a distillation area of the Citronella factory, containing 9 giant kettles that can 5,000 kg of citronella oil.

The revitalization of Rumah Atsiri is done using the juxtaposition method (contextual juxtaposition). The original building--that has become the identity of the place--was maintained, but new elements were included without damaging the old building. Today, this area functions as a shop that sells various signature products and souvenirs of Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, while the lower floor is used as a classroom for children to learn about essential oils.

In Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, the old and the new are juxtaposed to strengthen one another and to show that development can be done without erasing the history of a place. #rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsiriarchitecture

caption:
The Things You Need to Know Before Your Adventure in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia or RAI.

1. RAI is an essential oil education and recreation park. Besides enjoying the view of our pleasantly fragrant essential oil plants,  you can also learn more about the plants and #ExperienceTheEssence through essential oil itself.

2. While you are in RAI, do not pluck our essential oil plants. If you'd like to sniff or touch these plants, join our essential oil garden tour (Tur Taman Atsiri), where you can have the opportunity to sniff and touch them.

3. There is no entrance fee to visit RAI. You need only to buy an IDR50K voucher, which has a balance of IDR50K in exchange. You are free to use this voucher in RAI on the day of your visit; either to shop for souvenirs at our essential oil store, participate in classes and activities related to essential oils, or to dine in our restaurant and enjoy our some of our dishes with essential oil plants as their ingredients.

4. If you spend more than IDR50K, you can just pay for the shortage. Don't forget that the voucher can only be used on the day of your visit, and the remaining balance (if any) inside your voucher cannot be cashed back.

Enjoy your aromatic adventure in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia!

Hal-hal yang Perlu Diketahui Sebelum Bertualang di Rumah Atsiri Indonesia (RAI)

1. RAI adalah taman edukasi dan rekreasi atsiri. Selain menikmati pemandangan taman atsiri yang beraroma menyenangkan, kalian juga bisa belajar banyak tentang tanaman dan minyak atsiri itu sendiri.

2. Ketika berada di RAI, jangan memetik tanaman atsiri. Bila kalian ingin mencium dan menyentuh tanaman atsiri, ikutilah tur taman atsiri. Di tur ini, kalian akan berkesempatan mencium dan menyentuh tanaman-tanaman ini.

3. untuk masuk ke RAI kalian tidak dikenakan HTM. Cukup membeli prepaid voucher senilai 50 ribu yang memiliki saldo senilai 50 ribu juga. Kalian bisa menggunakan voucher ini untuk berbelanja oleh-oleh di toko atsiri, mengikuti kelas dan aktivitas atsiri, atau menikmati hidangan berbahan atsiri di Rumah Atsiri Resto.

4. Jika nilai transaksi kalian melebihi 50 ribu, kalian cukup membayar kekurangannya. Sisa saldo voucher tdk dapat diuangkan kembali.

caption:
In Purworejo, Central Java, there is a village called Bagelen. It is said that the village, whose name has been recorded since the era of Ancient Mataram Kingdom, was the first place in Indonesia to make Bagelen 'bread' (a type of toast bread introduced by the Europeans).
. 
A packaging wrap stated that the Bagelen Village has produced 'bagelen' since 1906. However, there are also other historical records showing that the city of Garut was the first to produce this snack. 55 years after the Java War ended, in 1885 to be exact, stood a bakery named Kho Pek Goan, that produced bagelen bread.

The long history of this European snack in Indonesia gave birth to the idea of making bagelen bread with essential oil plants and herbs, as a signature snack. One of the herbs used is rosemary.

Rosemary, or in Indonesia known as 'rosmarin', came from the Mediterranean. The plant itself resembles a small pine tree and gives off a fragrant aroma.

In addition to its distinctive taste to enrich the experience of your taste buds, rosemary also has some benefits for our body. Not only it improves memory and liver function, but it can also reduce stress and hair loss.

You can find this Rosemary Bagelen bread at our shop & restaurant in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.
#rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriresto

caption:
Honoring its original title as Pabrik Citronella (the Citronella Factory), the first essential oil produced by Rumah Atsiri Indonesia is citronella. Citronella, known by the locals as 'fragrant lemongrass' (sereh wangi) was originally distilled into citronella oil based on a shared-production agreement between Bulgary and Indonesia. Due to the distinctive accent of the Javanese, the local residents more often refer to the factory as 'Mbabrik Citronella' .

At the time, to fulfill the factory's production capacity that has 9 distillation boilers with each boiler producing 5,000 kilograms, a large quantity of fragrant lemongrass was needed. Thus, the 700-hectare of land around the factory was released to be repurposed as fragrant citronella fields. However, since the locals believe that the fertile land was more suitable for planting rice, they refused to become fragrant citronella farmers. As a result, citronella, instead, was planted on the mountain slopes, until the area of Wonogiri, south of Karanganyar.

Citronella essential oil itself is commonly used in the making of perfumes, fragrances, and medicines. A mixture of citronellol and geraniol--that is called rhodinol-carries flowery odors and is commonly used as one of the ingredients in expensive perfumes.

#rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsiri #citronella #rumahatsirilab

caption:
How to facilitate a meeting that not only runs pleasantly but also provokes fresh ideas? It is said that the best ideas are born in unusual settings!

The meeting rooms and event space in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, that was built by maintaining the original form of the old building (that was once used as a workshop for distillation machines of the Citronella factory), will provide that unusual setting. In addition to the cool temperature--even without air conditioning unit, the scenery and aroma of essential oil plants in Rumah Atsiri's garden exude a feeling of relaxation and excitement. The event spaces are not only available indoors, but also outdoors--directly facing the Marigold Plaza or Kebun (Garden) Atsiri.

However, more than just experiencing the comfort of your meeting and gathering venues, you can also experience your own essential oil adventure and learn about essential oil plants. The menus served by our restaurant also feature some dishes with essential oil plants as their ingredients. During your meeting break or recess, you can also take advantage of your spare time by joining our essential oil garden tour, or learn how to mix essential oils into your favorite aromatic blend--to stimulate your zeal and your creative brain power.

#rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsiri #nature #indonesia #wisatabaru #meetingtime

caption:
Despite aroma and medicine, with creativity, plants that produce essential oils can also be turned into dishes with distinctive flavors. Actually, there are many essential oil plants we are familiar with, that we commonly use for cooking, such as 'kitchen' lemongrass, basil, pepper, ginger, and mint. However, in Rumah Atsiri Resto, visitors can sample a variety of food and beverages with essential oil plants as their ingredients, such as Chicken Lemon Rosemary and Rosemary Red Atsiri. In fact, Rumah Atsiri also turned these plants into snacks that are not only delicious but also healthy.

Rumah Atsiri Resto was established in a building that used to be a workshop for maintaining the productivity of the Pabrik Citronella (Citronella Factory) machines. Rumah Atsiri Resto was built by maintaining the workshop's original shape, while the new steel-made building becomes the restaurant's outdoor area. Here, Rumah Atsiri Indonesia's visitors can savor various dishes made of essential oil plants while enjoying the views of the Marigold Plaza.

#rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriresto

caption:
Aroma is not the only thing that can provoke our memories. Signs and shapes can also do the same thing. This is why in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, visitors can find some repetitions of shapes and signs in several corners and areas. These include the shape of our front yard's paving and the corner of the steel pillar which support the concrete roof of Gedung Citronella's drop-off area. The same shape can also be found in the logo of Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.

What's so special about this shape for Rumah Atsiri Indonesia? 
The shape is actually a 'roster' (perforated wall) design of Rumah Atsiri Indonesia's original building, which has stood for more than 50 years.

The signature shape, in addition to the aroma, serves as a reminder of Rumah Atsiri Indonesia's origin, which was once a Citronella factory (Pabrik Citronella). Before World War II, the factory played an important rule in the trade of citronella oil's trading (one type of essential oils) in the global market.

The unification between aroma and shape is a good reminder of the glory of Indonesia's essential oils; while at the same time encouraging us to restore that glory.
#rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriarchitecture

caption:
Rumah Atsiri Indonesia (RAI) is the first essential oil recreation and education park in Indonesia. In RAI, visitors are not only invited to enjoy the cool and fresh air of Tawangmangu, the view of the eye-pleasing essential oil garden, or the soothing aroma--but also encouraged to learn more about essential oil plants.

Atsiri (or 'flying oils'), that is better known today as essential oils, have many benefits in our everyday lives. It is the main ingredient for a lot of cosmetics and perfumes, natural health products, and also food.

And, this is where things got more interesting. It turned out that Indonesia, before the Second World War, had become one of the producers of the best essential oils in the world. Where did Indonesia produce their best essential oils? In a citronella factory in Tawangmangu, that is now called Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.
--
Rumah Atsiri Indonesia (RAI) adalah taman rekreasi dan edukasi atsiri yang pertama di Indonesia. Di RAI, pengunjung tidak hanya diajak menikmati udara sejuk Tawangmangu, pemandangan taman atsiri yang memanjakan mata, aroma yang menenangkan, tetapi juga menambah pengetahuan tentang atsiri.

Atsiri atau minyak terbang sekarang lebih dikenal dengan istilah minyak esensial memiliki banyak manfaat dalam kehidupan sehari-hari. Ia menjadi bahan utama untuk kosmetik dan parfum, produk kesehatan alami, dan juga makanan.

Dan, ini yang paling menarik. Ternyata Indonesia sejak sebelum Perang Dunia Kedua telah menjadi salah satu penghasil minyak atsiri terbaik di dunia. Di mana minyak atsiri terbaik itu dihasilkan? Di sebuah pabrik citronella di Tawangmangu yang kini bernama Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.

caption:
There is a special program initiated by Rumah Atsiri Indonesia during this month of Ramadan; it's called 'Night at The Museum' .

The program will invite visitors to tour the Museum Atsiri while waiting for iftar. Museum Atsiri is specifically designed to provide an introduction to essential oils in our civilizations; and about how this oil was utilized in everyday life--from the ancient to modern times. Visitors will also be invited to distinguish the different fragrances of various essential oil plants and discover the kind of fragrances used in ancient civilizations. After touring the museum, visitors can have their iftar meals (that contains essential oil plants) at the restaurant (Rumah Atsiri Resto) .

During Ramadan, the museum is open ‪from 15.00-17.00‬ WIB. To access the museum, you only need to pay IDR 25K, while for the 'Night at The Museum' program, you need to pay IDR 150K/person, which includes your museum tickets and iftar meals.
-
Ada satu program khusus yang dibuat Rumah Atsiri Indonesia pada bulan Ramadan ini, namanya 'Night at The Museum' .

Program ini akan mengajak pengunjung berkeliling Museum Atsiri sembari menunggu buka puasa. Museum Atsiri merupakan museum yang secara khusus dirancang untuk memberikan pengenalan tentang minyak atsiri dalam peradaban manusia; bagaimana minyak ini dikembangkan kegunaannya dalam kehidupan sehari-hari sejak masa peradaban kuno hingga masa modern. Pengunjung juga akan diajak mengenali wewangian dari berbagai tanaman atsiri serta wewangian macam apa yang digunakan pada peradaban kuno. Selesai berkeliling museum, pengunjung bisa menyantap hidangan buka puasa yang mengandung atsiri di Resto Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.

Selama Ramadan, museum buka pada ‪pukul 15.00-17.00‬ WIB. Untuk mengakses museum, Anda cukup membayar senilai IDR 25K. Sedangkan untuk Program 'Night at The Museum' sendiri, bisa Anda ikuti dengan membayar sebesar IDR 150K/orang, sudah termasuk tiket museum dan hidangan berbuka.

#rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriindonesia #museum

caption:
Details, in architecture, play an important part--and Rumah Atsiri Indonesia is no exception. Not only strengthen an identity; details also reveal the stories behind a building.
—
During your visit to Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, try focusing your attention to the details of the building's architecture, both the exterior and the interior. On the parking area, notice how the shape of our pavings is different from the common block-shaped pavings. This different shape of paving can also be found on the frame of our restaurant's chairs and the corner pillar of our Rumah Atsiri Restaurant, on the plot of plants in Marigold Plaza, and on the logo of Rumah Atsiri itself.
—
The pavings' particular shape was originated from the shape of the ventilation blocks--a partition between spaces in a room that primarily functions as orifices for air circulations and lighting--in the old building of Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.
—
Have a nice adventure in Rumah Atsiri Indonesia! Here, you will not only trace the aroma of essential oils but also its historical footprints and the various efforts to nurture it.

#rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsiriarchitecture

caption:
Mawar Bulgaria yang ada di Rumah Atsiri Indonesia.

Bunga mawar yang kita kenal sebagai bunga simbol kasih sayang ternyata juga merupakan tanaman penghasil minyak mawar yang harganya tinggi.

Bulgaria dikenal sebagai produsen minyak mawar terbesar di dunia. Di Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, terdapat koleksi Mawar Bulgaria yang ada sejak pabrik Citronella ini dulu berdiri, dan didatangkan langsung dari negara asalnya pada tahun 1960-an dan masih ada sampai sekarang.

Ada berbagai jenis bunga mawar yang ada di Rumah Atsiri Indonesia yang dapat kalian temui di taman koleksi Rumah Atsiri Indonesia. Terdapat juga mawar lokal yang tidak kalah cantiknya dengan Mawar Bulgaria.

Adakah hari ini yang mendapat atau memberi bunga mawar pada orang yang terkasih? 
Di Rumah Atsiri Indonesia kalian dapat menemui serta mencium langsung aroma harum Mawar Bulgaria yang terkenal itu.

caption:
Believe it or not, human beings are not the only ones that can shape a building's architecture, as Winston Churchill (1943) and Laurens (2004) said, but the architecture of a building can also shape human beings.
.
.
This explains why one of the things we preserved when the Citronella Factory in Tawangmangu, Karanganyar, was revitalized into Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, was its original building's architecture. For us, the architecture of this essential oil factory, which was established on August 1, 1963, is a symbol of diplomacy between two countries, Indonesia and Bulgary. It's a building that is also a testament to the glory of Indonesian essential oils in the global market.

The revitalization of Rumah Atsiri Indonesia was done using the contextual juxtaposition method. The original building, that has become the identity of the site, was preserved; however, something new was also introduced without damaging the original building.  If you are visiting Rumah Atsiri, one of our landmarks is the architecture of the complex. The old and the new were juxtaposed to show how growth should always take place in harmony with the environment surrounding it.

#rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsirilandscape

caption:
Rumah Atsiri Indonesia was originally intended to be the biggest essential oil (minyak atsiri) factory in Asia. This factory was a lighthouse project of Indonesia's First President, Ir. Soekarno, during his leadership. Thanks to the good relations with the Bulgarian government, on August 1, 1963, an essential oil factory was established in Tawangmangu, Karanganyar, Indonesia, under the name Citronella Factory / Pabrik Citronella.

The current Rumah Atsiri Indonesia is a renovated 50-year-old factory with a modern touch that still preserves the original design of the buildings. When you're visiting Rumah Atsiri Indonesia, you can differentiate the old and new designs through the materials used. The old design (our main buildings) mainly used concrete and iron, while the recent one used steel, wood, and glass.

This is the way we value history through preserving an existing architectural style, and showing that an establishment can be built and developed without having to eliminate what is considered 'ancient'. The old and the new can reinforce one another in architecture.

Happy National Architecture Day!
#rumahatsiri #rumahatsiriindonesia #rumahatsiriarchitecture #rumahatsirilandscape

The current Rumah Atsiri Indonesia is a renovated 50-year-old factory with a modern touch that still preserves the original design of the buildings. Kokedama (苔玉, in English, "moss ball") is a popular planting technique where a plant’s root system is simply wrapped in moss, bounded with strings, transforming it into a sculptural art form.

In this workshop we learn to make your own Atsiri Kokedama that can be used as both decoration and room freshener.

Date : March 16, 2019
Venue : Rumah Atsiri Indonesia
Early bird price 180k
Normal price 200k

caption:
Rumah Atsiri Indonesia stood in what once was the largest essential oil factory in Southeast Asia, called Pabrik Citronella or the Citronella Factory. The factory, which was established in 1963, is a historical testament of the cooperation between Bulgary and Indonesia in producing citronella oil, which dominated the European market because it has the best quality in the world.

Not many people are aware of Indonesia's track record in this essential oil industry. While actually, Indonesia is one of the largest suppliers of essential oils in the world before World War II. There were 40 types of essential oils we produced, and 12 of them rule the international market.

Essential oil or 'minyak atsiri' in Indonesian is an oil with a particular scent that is taken from parts of plants and easily evaporates at low room temperatures. Due to its volatile nature, essential oils are often also called 'minyak terbang' or 'flying oils'. Essential oils are the main ingredients used for food & beverages flavorings, fragrances, cosmetics, self-care products' mixture (soap, shampoo, rubbing oil), and medicines.

Today, Rumah Atsiri Indonesia has transformed into a place that hosts various activities related to essential oil's edu-recreation, research, and development.

caption:
Apa yang bisa kita pelajari di kebun koleksi rumah atsiri kak? -

Di kebun koleksi kita  akan bertualang mengenali berbagai aroma tanaman dan juga manfaatnya di kehidupan manusia dulu,  sekarang bahkan nanti. -

Ada selembar daun yang telihat sederhana, selebar telapak tangan dengan tekstur sedikit berbulu halus dan tipis. Meremasnya lalu menciumnya akan membawa ingatan kita kepada kain tua yang dulu disimpan di lemari kayu. Nenek buyut memanfaatkannya sebagai pelembut kain dan pencegah ngengat. Minyak atsiri daun ini menurut para ahli mempunyai kiprah besar dalam berbagai industri. Itu baru salah satu tanaman. Hayo tanaman apa?? Selain itu, masih banyak tanaman lain yang bisa diceritakan!
-

Lalu setelah itu ada apa lagi kak?  Bisa ikut @citronellasciencelab untuk belajar tentang aplikasi minyak atsiri di kehidupan sehari hari. Kelas sains ini asik dan menyenangkan bagi anak anak dan dewasa. -

caption:
Alam dan seisinya adalah guru terbaik.
-

Merekam segala yang ada di alam dengan seluruh panca indera  sangat penting bagi anak untuk menumbuhkan rasa senang bereksplorasi dan ingin tahu. Melihat, meraba, dan merasakan berbagai jenis tanaman atsiri dan manfaatnya akan memberikan pengalaman yang baru bagi anak-anak, didampingi oleh edukator yang menceritakan manfaat tanaman atsiri.  Dilanjutkan dengan keseruan aktifitas saintifik dalam kelas CSL dengan praktik langsung membuat beragam eksperimen dengan bahan minyak atsiri. -

Sambungan dari part 1.

Pabrik Citronella (nama asli tempat ini) didirikan di tahun 1963 dengan tujuan untuk menjadi pabrik minyak atsiri terbesar di Asia karena negara Indonesia memiliki potensi untuk menjadi jaya di mata dunia melalui minyak atsiri. Rumah Atsiri Indonesia mengangkat edu-rekreasi sebagai misi utama kami untuk kembali mengingatkan generasi-generasi muda bahwa negara kita ini kaya akan potensi di bidang minyak atsiri. Nah, misi inilah yang pada akhirnya menjadi cikal bakal terbentuknya @museumatsiri , @citronellasciencelab , perpustakaan rooftop dan taman-taman luas di area kompleks rumah atsiri yang memiliki berbagai jenis koleksi tanaman atsiri. Sculpture (n) | sculp·ture | \ˈskəlp-chər\ awalnya didefinisikan sebagai proses memahat atau mengukir suatu bahan padat  menjadi suatu bentuk ataupun relief. Dalam perkembangannya, seni ini dicirikan dengan adanya proses dan hasilnya berupa karya 3D dengan berbagai macam bahan baku dan berbagai fungsi. Di Indonesia sendiri, sculpture diciptakan sebagai suatu sarana sembahyang, maupun sebagai suatu monumen untuk mengabadikan suatu peristiwa ataupun tokoh penting. -

Nantinya sculpture ini bisa menjadi salah satu point of view swa-foto yang iconic. Lokasinya ada di halaman depan Rumah Atsiri yang sedang dalam proses penyelesaian pembangunan.

caption:
Green House Rumah Atsiri Indonesia di kala senja bersama pemandangan puncak Gunung Lawu.
-
Sambungan dari part 2.
-
Misi Rumah Atsiri Indonesia tidak berhenti di pengenalan minyak atsiri terhadap generasi muda dan masyarakat luas saja. Rumah Atsiri Indonesia juga mengembangkan research & development di bidang minyak atsiri dan produk-produk turunan nya. Tentu saja kita harus terus menerus mengikuti teknologi dan tren-tren baru agar bisa selalu relevan di mata publik  serta dapat menghasilkan produk-produk lokal berkualitas yang bisa dikenal dunia. Produk-produk hasil riset lab akan dijual di marketplace Rumah Atsiri alias RAshop bersama produk lain yang sudah melalui proses kurasi. RAshop inilah yang nantinya akan di duplikasi di kota-kota ataupun negara lain.
-

caption:
Kokedama terdiri dari kata “koke” yang berarti lumut/moss dan “dama” yang berarti bola. Sehingga kokedama biasa disebut bola lumut, atau tanah yang dibentuk seperti bola dan dibungkus dengan lumut.
-

Kokedama pertama muncul di Jepang, merupakan kombinasi antara bonsai tipe Nearai dan Kusamono. Bonsai tipe Nearai adalah miniatur pohon yang di-display pada tembikar atau potongan kayu. Sementara bonsai tipe Kusamono merupakan bonsai dengan peletakan rumput liar dan bunga pada pot atau wadah yang unik. Dan kokedama juga merupakan estetika dari Wabi-sabi, yang merepresentasikan pemandangan Jepang di dunia.
-

caption:
Tempat cantik yang tadinya merupakan pabrik minyak atsiri di era Presiden Soekarno ini berpindah tangan ke PT. Rumah Atsiri Indonesia pada tahun 2015 silam. Sekilas cerita dibalik berdirinya Rumah Atsiri Indonesia; pada saat pertama kali mengunjungi pabrik minyak ini, kami kerkagum-kagum sekaligus heran dengan arsitektur bangunannya. Kok bisa ya, ada bangunan yang di bangun pada tahun 1963, tapi memiliki desain yang bisa dibilang kekinian dengan struktur yang masih kokoh, ditambah view sawah-sawah hijau di sekeliling area ini. Rasanya seperti melihat hidden gem baru di Indonesia. Sejak 2015, kami terus mempelajari tentang tempat ini, tentang sejarahnya, tentang tujuan awal didirikannya tempat ini, sampai ke pengetahuan-pengetahuan tentang minyak atsiri. Setelah mengenali dan mempelajari tempat ini, kami memutuskan untuk mengembalikannya ke tujuan utama ia ada, yaitu, untuk mengharumkan nama Indonesia melalui kekayaan minyak atsiri. Bersambung
-
Dibalik Rumah Atsiri Indonesia part 1
-

caption:
Cara memperoleh minyak atsiri pt. 1
-Distilasi: metode pengambilan minyak paling umum dengan menggunakan pemanasan. Dibagi menjadi 3 jenis: distilasi air, distilasi uap, dan distilasi uap dan air. Bagian daun dan akar banyak menggunakan metode ini.
-Ekstraksi minyak absolut: metode yang banyak digunakan dalam pengambilan minyak atsiri dari bunga.

caption:
Apa itu Atsiri?
Minyak Atsiri atau minyak essensial / minyak aromatik adalah kelompok besar minyak nabati yang berwujud cairan kental pada suhu ruangan, namun mudah menguap sehingga memberi aroma yang khas.
---------------------
Minyak Atsiri merupakan bahan dasar wangi-wangian atau minyak gosok (untuk pengobatan) alami.
----------------------
Minyak Atsiri bersifat mudah menguap karena titik uap nya rendah. Selain, susunan senyawa komponennya kuat mempengaruhi saraf manusia (terutama di hidung), sehingga sering kali memberikan efek psikologis tertentu. Setiap senyawa penyusun memiliki efek tersendiri, dan campurannya dapat menghasilkan rasa yang berbeda. Karena pengaruh psikologis ini, minyak atsiri merupakan komponen penting dalam aromatherapy atau kegiatan-kegiatan liturgi dan olah pikiran / jiwa seperti yoga atau ayurveda.
Sumber: wikipedia
----------------
